change_to_normalize_hypothesis_before_sp.tactic: change (gsStepWith prof σ m₀ w₀).matching.womenMatch w = some m at hmatch
change_to_normalize_hypothesis_before_sp.trigger: hmatch contains unreduced match/gsStepWith expressions that don't match local set/let definitions
change_to_normalize_hypothesis_before_sp.prerequisite: must have set m₀ := Classical.choose hfree and set w₀ := gsChooseMax prof σ m₀ hm₀.2 before
change_to_normalize_hypothesis_before_sp.next_step: simp only [gsStepWith] at hmatch; split at hmatch

split_at_hmatch_after_simp_only.tactic:
simp only [gsStepWith] at hmatch
split at hmatch
split_at_hmatch_after_simp_only.trigger: after simp only [DefName], a match expression remains that simp [discriminant_eq] cannot reduce
split_at_hmatch_after_simp_only.failure_avoided: simp [hwm] reports 'made no progress' — fundamental limitation of simp on match

rcases_before_subst_anti_reflexivity.tactic:
rcases hsrc with (hw' | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩)
· subst hw; ...
· exact le_rfl
rcases_before_subst_anti_reflexivity.trigger: rcases with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ may unify variables, making hw : w₀ = w₀ reflexive, and subst fails
rcases_before_subst_anti_reflexivity.failure_avoided: subst hw fails with 'reflexive equality' when hw : w₀ = w₀ after prior unification

explicit_mem_iff_arguments.trigger: proposedSet.mem_iff (m', w) gives type mismatch — needs full @ with n, inst, prof, σ
explicit_mem_iff_arguments.failure_avoided: Application type mismatch: (m', w) expected to be PrefProfile

dsimp_before_rw_on_match_constructs.tactic:
dsimp [GSMatching.swapMatch] at hmatch
rw [Function.update_apply] at hmatch
dsimp_before_rw_on_match_constructs.trigger: rw [Function.update_apply] fails when hmatch still contains unreduced swapMatch/matchFree definition

show_instead_of_unfold_for_noncomputable.trigger: unfold fails or produces unreadable goals on noncomputable def := by ... definitions
show_instead_of_unfold_for_noncomputable.alternative: use show to explicitly state the type, or simp only [def_name]

patterns.name: change_normalize
patterns.when: hypothesis contains raw Classical.choose/gsChooseMax that don't match local definitions

patterns.name: split_at_for_match
patterns.when: simp only [Def] leaves irreducible match expression

patterns.name: rcases_before_subst
patterns.when: need both rcases and subst on potentially reflexive equality
patterns.tactic: rcases h with (... | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩); · subst hw; ...; · exact le_rfl
not: subst hw; rcases h — reflexive equality blocks subst

patterns.name: explicit_@_args
patterns.when: lemma has implicit args that Lean cannot infer in context
